title: phruasso #5433
definition:
1) to neigh, stamp the ground, prance, snort
 2) to be high-spirited
    2a) of horses
    2b) of men
        2b1) to take on lofty airs
        2b2) behave arrogantly
    2c) to be tumultuous, to rage
nasbUsage:
